title: Data Center MCP Server Input
description: Configuration parameters for the Data Center Engineering MCP Server

API_KEY.title: API Key (Optional)
API_KEY.description: Optional API key for authentication. Use if deploying with a managed service that requires API keys.

RATE_LIMIT_RPM.title: Rate Limit (requests per minute)
RATE_LIMIT_RPM.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per minute. Default is 100 requests/minute. Increase for higher throughput needs, decrease to reduce server load.

PORT.title: Server Port
PORT.description: HTTP port number to run the MCP server on. Default is 3000. Must be between 1024 and 65535 (avoid system ports below 1024).

REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS.title: Request Timeout (milliseconds)
REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to allow for request processing. Default is 30000ms (30 seconds).

ENABLE_METRICS.title: Enable Metrics Collection
ENABLE_METRICS.description: Enable collection of performance metrics and request statistics
